summary: Iteration 82 - REDD+, SSRTE, ICI KPIs and Subscription Banner Testing Complete. All backend API tests passed (12/12). All frontend features verified successfully. Dashboard displays subscription banner with trial info, REDD+ widget with 3 KPIs, SSRTE widget with risk distribution and ICI remediation section. All data-testid attributes present. Navigation to /cooperative/mrv and /cooperative/ssrte works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Backend GET /api/cooperative/dashboard-kpis returns 200 with subscription, features, redd, ssrte, ici data
PASS: Subscription Banner shows 'Essai Gratuit Pro' plan name with 'ESSAI' badge and '179 jours restants'
PASS: REDD+ Widget displays with data-testid='redd-widget' and shows 3 KPIs (Score Moyen, Visites Terrain, Producteurs)
PASS: REDD+ Widget shows 'Monitoring avancé' label for Pro/Trial plans
PASS: SSRTE Widget displays with data-testid='ssrte-widget' showing Visites, Enfants, Couverture
PASS: SSRTE Widget shows Risk Distribution grid (Critique, Elevé, Modéré, Faible) with color-coded badges
PASS: SSRTE Widget shows ICI Remediation section (Cas, Résolus, En cours) for Pro+ plans
PASS: SSRTE Widget shows coverage progress bar and farmers visited count
PASS: Quick Actions Panel categories: Exploitation, Commerce, Carbone & REDD+, Conformité
PASS: Dashboard Header with cooperative name, navigation (Accueil, Profil, Ajouter Membre)
PASS: KPI Strip with 4 metric cards (Membres Actifs, Superficie Totale, CO₂ Capture, Primes à Distribuer)
PASS: All data-testid attributes present on new widgets (subscription-banner, redd-widget, ssrte-widget, etc.)
PASS: Navigation from REDD+ Details button goes to /cooperative/mrv
PASS: Navigation from SSRTE Details button goes to /cooperative/ssrte
PASS: Commission card with edit/save functionality works correctly
PASS: All text is in French - no English terms found
PASS: Design colors correct - header #1A3622 (deep forest green), subscription banner gold tint, white text on dark header
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 verified the new REDD+, SSRTE, ICI KPI widgets and subscription banner on the cooperative dashboard. The test user has a Trial subscription (coop_trial) with Pro features unlocked. All KPI values are 0 because there's no REDD+/SSRTE data for this user yet, but all widgets render correctly with 0 values. The subscription shows 179 days remaining on the trial. The upgrade button is not visible because the trial has >60 days remaining (expected behavior per SubscriptionBanner.jsx logic). All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for automated testing.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent

response_structure.features: dict with feature flags (redd_avance, alertes_ssrte, rapports_ssrte_ici, etc.)

design_theme.text_contrast: Good (white text on dark green header)
